creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
At Thu, 23 Aug 2012 19:43:12 -0500,
Bryan Drewery wrote:
> 
> Hi,
> 
> The attached patch does not work.
> 
> I've been experimenting with this and have been unable to find the
> reason it is failing. The INSTALLS_ICONS macro adds an @unexec rm into
> the plist which cleans up the icon cache. For some reason tinderbox and
> pointyhat are failing with this.
> 
> I'm still looking into it, but wanted you to be aware as well.
> 
> -- 
> Regards,
> Bryan Drewery
> bdrewery@freenode/EFNet
> 

Sorry about the trouble, I will try to come up with a better fix.

I just imitated that from another port, I will check again to see exactly what
the port maintainer did to get a proper pkg-plist, to avoid build errors.

Regards,
Tim
